title: Smart Data Models - OpenStreetMap / OSMPublicTransportStop
description: A public transport stop, station, platform or boarding point from OpenStreetMap. Represents nodes and areas where passengers board or alight from public transport services, tagged with public_transport=* or specific mode tags.

type.description: Property. NGSI Entity type. It has to be OSMPublicTransportStop

osmId.description: Property. The original OpenStreetMap element integer identifier. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Elements'

osmType.description: Property. The type of the original OpenStreetMap element. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Elements'

osmLastModified.description: Property. Timestamp of the last modification of the OSM element.

publicTransportType.description: Property. The OSM public_transport tag value indicating the role of this element in the public transport network. Enum:'stop_position, platform, station, stop_area'. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:public_transport'

items.description: Property. Every transport modes served at this stop. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Public_transport'

transportMode.description: Property. List of transport modes served at this stop. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Public_transport'

network.description: Property. Name of the public transport network this stop belongs to. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:network'

operator.description: Property. Name of the operator running services at this stop. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:operator'

ref.description: Property. Official stop reference code or number used by the transport operator. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:ref'

shelter.description: Property. Indicates whether a weather shelter is available at this stop. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:shelter'

bench.description: Property. Indicates whether a bench or seating is available at this stop. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:bench'

bin.description: Property. Indicates whether a waste bin is present at this stop. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:bin'

wheelchair.description: Property. Indicates the level of wheelchair accessibility at this stop. Enum:'yes, no, limited'. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:wheelchair'

tactilePaving.description: Property. Indicates whether tactile paving for visually impaired users is present. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:tactile_paving'

openingHours.description: Property. Opening hours of the stop or station in OSM opening_hours syntax. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:opening_hours'

seeAlso.description: Property. List of URIs pointing to additional resources about this item.
